new_block:
--[=[
	@description Applies a fixed-alpha EMA (PERF_SMOOTH_ALPHA = 0.25) to the four
	performance metrics stored in `self._perfCache` (FPS, MemoryMB, ActiveTasks,
	FrameBudgetMs) and writes the results to `self._smoothPerf`.
	Also computes per-metric direction indicators (-1 / 0 / 1) in `self._perfDirections`
	by comparing the current raw value against the previous raw snapshot held in
	`self._prevPerf`.  Values that differ less than the per-metric threshold in
	`PERF_STABLE_THRESHOLD` are classified as stable (direction = 0).
	Reads: `_perfCache`, `_smoothPerf`, `_prevPerf`.
	Writes: `_smoothPerf`, `_perfDirections`, `_prevPerf`.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Main data-collection pass, called by ServiceBrain every ~2 s.
	In client mode: enumerates `orchestrator.Scheduler.Tasks`, classifies each task
	as `error > running > active > idle` using an adaptive active-window
	(max(3 s, 2 * TaskExecutionDelay)) and run-count delta tracking stored in
	`_prevRunCounts` / `_lastActiveTime`.  Also reads the History ring buffer (indices
	0–99) to populate `_completedTasks` with one-shot tasks that have already
	been unscheduled.  In server mode: reads equivalent data from `nexus._serverData`.
	After collection, appends a snapshot to `_perfHistory` (capped at 60), calls
	`_UpdateSmoothedPerf`, and publishes `tasks.list` and `tasks.perf` to the Store.
	@param nexus any -- Nexus instance; provides `_orchestrator`, `_serverData`,
	`_contextMode`, `_lastFPS`, and `Store`.
	Writes: `_taskCache`, `_completedTasks`, `_perfCache`, `_prevRunCounts`,
	`_lastActiveTime`, `_perfHistory`, `_lastFetchTime`, and the Store.
]=]

anchor: function TasksModule:_GetSortedFilteredTasks(): { { Name: string, Data: any } }

new_block:
--[=[
	@description Renders a 180×44 px FPS history sparkline inside `strip`.
	Creates the `Sparkline` container with a `Segments` sub-frame, `TitleLbl` (FPS),
	`Midline` grid reference, and `MaxLbl` / `MinLbl` / `LiveLbl` text labels on
	first call.  On every call destroys all children of `Segments` and redraws up
	to the last 30 samples from `_perfHistory`.  Each sample is plotted as a 2 px
	line segment (rotated Frame) plus a 4 px dot, coloured green ≥55 FPS,
	amber ≥30 FPS, or red otherwise.  The y-axis range is padded to ±5 FPS when the
	spread is less than 5 so a stable line never renders flat against min/max.
	@param strip Frame -- The PerfStrip frame containing (or to contain) `Sparkline`.
	Reads: `_perfHistory`.
]=]

anchor: function TasksModule:_BuildTaskRow(parent: Frame, name: string, taskData: any, nexus: any, order: number): Frame
function TasksModule:_BuildPropRow(parent: Frame, key: string, value: string, color: Color3, order: number)

new_block:
--[=[
	@description Entry point for the profiler data-collection pass.
	Dispatches to `_FetchClient` in client mode or `_FetchServer` (snapshot path)
	in server mode.  In server mode also applies the client's live FPS from
	`nexus._lastFPS` to `_frameBudget.FPS` after the snapshot is read.
	After collection writes `profiler.frameBudget`, `profiler.taskCount`, and
	`profiler.fsmCount` to the Store via a BatchUpdate.
	@param nexus any -- Nexus instance; provides `_orchestrator`, `_serverData`,
	`_contextMode`, `_lastFPS`, and `Store`.
	Writes: `_frameBudget.FPS`, and the Store keys listed above.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Populates profiler state from a live orchestrator in client mode.
	Tasks: iterates `orchestrator.Scheduler.Tasks`, computing AvgMs, MaxMs,
	RunCount, MemoryAvgKB, MemoryMaxKB, Priority, IsRecurring, and Event.
	Also reads `LastFrameStats` for `_frameBudget` and calls
	`GetThreadPoolStats` (pcall-guarded) for `_threadPool`.
	FSMs: enumerates `Factory.Registry:GetAllStateMachines()` and records
	AvgMs, MaxMs, UpdateCount, MemDeltaKB, IsActive, and current State.
	Network: delegates to `_FetchNetworkClient`.  GC: `collectgarbage('count')`.
	Instance memory: delegates to `_FetchInstanceMemoryLocal`.
	@param orchestrator any -- Live orchestrator table exposed by Nexus.
	@param nexus any? -- Nexus instance used to read `_lastFPS`.
	Writes: `_taskPerf`, `_fsmPerf`, `_frameBudget`, `_threadPool`,
	`_networkTraffic`, `_gcStats`, `_instanceMemory`.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Populates profiler state from a server-side snapshot table.
	Handles unit-conversion edge cases: FrameTime/Budget values <1 are assumed
	to be in seconds and are multiplied by 1000; BudgetMs falls back to 16.6 if
	the result is below 0.1 ms.  Reads `serverData.Tasks`, `serverData.FSM`,
	`serverData.Network` (Commands, EventBuses, Remotes — sorted by message count),
	and `serverData.InstanceMemory`.  Resets all state to empty/zero if
	`serverData` is nil.
	@param serverData any? -- Server performance snapshot from `nexus._serverData`.
	Writes: `_taskPerf`, `_fsmPerf`, `_frameBudget`, `_networkTraffic`,
	`_gcStats`, `_instanceMemory`.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Enumerates descendant counts across key Roblox services to estimate
	instance-tree memory pressure.  Walks ReplicatedStorage, Workspace, Lighting,
	SoundService, and PlayerGui (client only).  Identifies top offenders (children
	of RS with >50 descendants, Workspace children with >100) and duplicate assets
	(multiple children of RS/Assets sharing the same name).  Results are capped
	to 15 top offenders and 10 duplicates.
	Writes: `_instanceMemory` (`{ Services, TopOffenders, TotalDescendants,
	DuplicateAssets? }`).
]=]

new_block:
--[=[
	@description Main data-collection pass for the Network panel.
	In client mode: enumerates `nm.EventBuses`, `nm.ServerRequestCallbacksSync`,
	`nm.ServerRequestCallbacksAsync`, `nm.EntityCommandCallbacks`, and named
	Remote instances (OrchestratorEvent/Function, EntityUpdateEvent/CommandEvent).
	Message counts and RecentCalls are read from `nm._busStats` / `nm._remoteStats`.
	In server mode: reads equivalent data from `nexus._serverData.Network`.
	Publishes `network.commands`, `network.buses`, and `network.callbacks` to Store.
	@param nexus any -- Nexus; provides `_orchestrator`, `_serverData`,
	`_contextMode`, and `Store`.
	Writes: `_commandCache`, `_eventBusCache`, `_serverCallbacks`, and the Store.
]=]

anchor: function NetworkModule:_DetectCommandType(name: string, cmd: any): string
function NetworkModule:_GetAllItems(): { { Name: string, Data: any } }

new_block:
--[=[
	@description Renders a 44 px summary strip with four metric cells:
	COMMANDS (count from `_commandCache`), BUSES (count from `_eventBusCache`),
	SRV CB (count from `_serverCallbacks`), MESSAGES (total across both caches).
	Each cell is a clickable `TextButton`; COMMANDS clears `_searchText`,
	BUSES sets it to 'EventBus', SRV CB sets it to 'ServerRequest', then
	forces a data refresh via `_nexusRef._lastDataRefresh = 0`.
	@param parent Frame -- Container that receives the `NetSummary` frame.
	Reads: `_commandCache`, `_eventBusCache`, `_serverCallbacks`, `_nexusRef`.
	Writes: `_searchText` (on cell click).
]=]

new_block:
--[=[
	@description Incremental log ingestion pass called by ServiceBrain on each tick.
	Uses cursor fields (`_lastLoggerCount` etc.) to only process new entries since
	the last call — prevents O(n) re-scan of the entire log buffer on each tick.
	Reads from `orchestrator.Logger.History`, `nexus._logs`, and (server mode)
	`nexus._serverData.Logs`.  When any new entries are found: trims `_logCache`
	to 2×MAX, calls `_ApplyFilters` and `_RenderLogs`.  Always publishes
	`logs.count`, `logs.filteredCount`, and `logs.filter` to the Store.
	@param nexus any -- Nexus; provides `_orchestrator`, `_logs`, `_serverData`,
	`_contextMode`, and `Store`.
	Writes: `_logCache`, `_filteredLogs`, `_lastLoggerCount`,
	`_lastInternalLogCount`, `_lastServerLogCount`, and the Store.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Rebuilds `_filteredLogs` from `_logCache` by applying the
	active level filter and text search.  Level filter skips entries whose
	`Level` does not match `_activeFilter` (unless filter is 'ALL').
	Text search applies a case-insensitive `find` against both `entry.Message`
	and `entry.Source`.  The result is trimmed to MAX_DISPLAY_LOGS = 200.
	Reads: `_logCache`, `_activeFilter`, `_searchText`.
	Writes: `_filteredLogs`.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Tweens the visual state of the five filter buttons to reflect
	`_activeFilter`.  The active button transitions to 0.3 background transparency
	and white text; inactive buttons transition to 0.8 transparency and their
	level colour.  Uses `TweenService` with `Theme.Tween.Fast`.
	Reads: `_filterButtons`, `_activeFilter`.
]=]

--[=[
	@description Clears and re-renders all log rows in `_scrollFrame`.
	Destroys every `Frame` and `TextLabel` child of `LogScroll`, then iterates
	`_filteredLogs` creating one row per entry.  Each row shows a level icon,
	timestamp (formatted as hh:mm:ss), level-coloured text, source badge,
	and the log message.  Rows with CorrelationId show a dim correlation badge.
	Reads: `_filteredLogs`, `_scrollFrame`.
]=]
